# PHIL.077 ? Critical Theory

## Core Principles
Frankfurt School; ideology critique; emancipatory knowledge; reason and domination; dialectical social theory

Critique ideology and power structures; emancipatory aims; dialectical analysis; reason's instrumental turn; social transformation

- Emancipation
- Social transformation
- Dialectical reason
